meaning: [复]n.[用作单或复]血液动力学;血液动力
examples: Methods: Parameters of haemodynamics were examined in anesthetic dogs.
Objective: To observe the influence of puerarin on haemodynamics in vascular cognitive impairment (VCI) patients.
Conclusion: We choose the best PEEP for the unstable haemodynamics patients with mechanic ventilation through the noninvasive heart function monitor.
